title: sesleria korabensis
intro: Sesleria korabensis, also known as Balkan moor-grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. This perennial grass has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Sesleria korabensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, which can contribute to the prevention of various diseases. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of teas, infusions, or extracts, although further research is needed to fully understand its therapeutic applications.
